SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORRIS, ROBERT A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MICROSOFT CORPORATION IT IS UNREASONABLE FOR A PURCHASER OF A $149.00 COMPUTER SUPPORT SERVICE OFFERED BY DEFENDANT TO EXPECT HIGHLY SOPHISTICATED AND EXPENSIVE TECHNICAL SUPPORT WITHIN THAT SERVICE. COSTS ARE NOT AWARDED AS DEFENDANT MADE AN OFFER OF A $149.00 REFUND WHICH PLAINTIFF REJECTED PRIOR TO FILING HIS CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
